visual_description: Two men in light-colored shirts and dark ties sit side by side in an office setting, one looking down while the other looks toward him. The man on the left, wearing a uniform with epaulets, turns his head slightly toward the other man. Both are seated in chairs, with the background showing office furniture and a window.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no significant prosody or non-speech sounds.
